# EXP — Testing / measurement

Genus: **Experimentum**

Whether the claim is measured through a disciplined design.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H070 | *Experimentum experimentalis* var. h070-showing-experiment-process | I. Originality and trust | Showing the experiment process builds more trust than only showing conclusions. | SAV | M-PRE |
| H076 | *Experimentum nativa* var. h076-average-percentage-viewed | YouTube Shorts | Average percentage viewed is more useful than raw view count for creative diagnosis. | RET | M-PRE |
| H090 | *Experimentum experimentalis* var. h090-showing-experiment-process | Originality / experiment process | Showing the experiment process builds more trust than only showing conclusions. | SAV | M-PRE |
| H154 | *Experimentum actionalis* var. h154-ranking-views-leads | Metric validity | Ranking videos by raw views leads to worse creative decisions than ranking by retention plus saves, sends, and follows. | SAV | M-PRE |
| H156 | *Experimentum actionalis* var. h156-high-views-follow | Metric validity | High raw views with low follow conversion indicate weak account fit. | FOL | M-PRE |
| H215 | *Experimentum experimentalis* var. h215-build-trust-they | Behind-the-scenes / process | BTS videos build trust when they reveal a decision, not just aesthetics. | TRU | M-PRE |
| H368 | *Experimentum probatoria* var. h368-recipe-save-measurements | Food / cooking | Recipe videos save better when measurements are on screen long enough to screenshot. | SAV | M-PRE |
| H386 | *Experimentum actionalis* var. h386-design-critique-follow | Art / design | Design critique videos follow better when they explain the decision logic. | FOL | M-PRE |
| H407 | *Experimentum storyformis* var. h407-variant-test-usually | Variant design | A 3-variant test is usually enough to detect direction before producing a 10-variant batch. | MIX | M-PRE |
| H413 | *Experimentum actionalis* var. h413-follower-heavy-follower | Cohort comparison | Follower-heavy and non-follower-heavy posts need separate diagnosis. | FOL | M-PRE |
| H435 | *Experimentum experimentalis* var. h435-iterate-value-packaging | Decision rules | Iterate when the content value is strong but the packaging gate failed. | MIX | M-PRE |
